name: Baker Athletic Field
description: Baker Athletic Field is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Rumney, NH. You’ll have to create your own lines and bring your own net. A membership is required to play.

name: Betsy's Park
description: Come play pickleball at Betsy's Park in Holderness, NH! There are 2 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. A membership is required to play.

name: CCBA Witherell Recreation Center
description: Membership is not required to play. Guests can purchase a day-pass at the welcome desk and participate in Pickleball.

name: Franconia Inn Pickleball Courts
description:
The Franconia Inn has converted one of its beautiful clay tennis courts into two clay pickleball courts! Come play pickleball with great views of the mountains. $20 for 90 minutes of play, $30 for 3 hours. Must call to reserve. All reservations subject to availability and weather.
The Franconia Inn also serves dinner and offers lodging, horseback riding, bike rentals, tennis, and pool day passes.
fees: Fee required — $20 per court for 90 minutes, $30 for 3 hours

name: Kelly Park, Bristol
description: Come play pickleball at Kelly Park, Bristol in Bristol, NH! There are 2 outdoor courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts are free.

name: Owl's Nest Resort
description: Owl's Nest Resort is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Thornton, NH. There are 13 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Amenities include food, restrooms, water, wheelchair accessibility, a pro shop or equipment store, and trainers or lessons. A one-time fee is required to play. The courts can be reserved.

name: White Mountain Pickleball Club
description: White Mountain Pickleball Club is a place to play pickleball in Lincoln, NH. There are 4 indoor hard and concrete courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts cannot be reserved. A one-time fee is required to play. Amenities include restrooms, water, lights, and trainers or lessons.
fees:
Fee required — Various membership levels. Non members pay for court time.
Members use Court Reserve app to book court time.
